description_long: This advertising board is a freestanding, rectangular prism with a slightly tapered profile, wider at the top than at the base. The front face features a printed promotional poster with a blue and white color scheme, offering exclusive discounts for loyal customers, and includes both text and abstract graphic elements. The sides are black with diagonal gray stripes, adding a modern, dynamic visual accent. The rear face is covered in a bold geometric pattern of small black triangles and horizontal lines on a white background, creating a striking contrast to the front. The frame appears to be metallic, likely aluminum, with a smooth, hard finish and sharp, clean edges. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, suitable for high-traffic commercial or retail environments.
description: A sleek, freestanding advertising board with a metallic frame, featuring a promotional poster on the front and bold geometric patterns on the back and sides.
description_view_0: The front view displays a promotional poster with blue and white text, abstract graphics, and a metallic frame.
description_view_1: The left side view shows a black surface with diagonal gray stripes, no visible text or graphics.
description_view_2: The rear view features a dense geometric pattern of black triangles and horizontal lines on a white background.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, with black and gray diagonal stripes and no visible poster or text.
attribute_frame_design: medium-thickness metallic frame with sharp, clean edges
attribute_advertisement_content: static printed poster for a retail loyalty program with discount offers
